overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a foggy Victorian mansion garden at night. The player character walks through covered arbors, open courtyards, and around a central fountain, with warm lantern light contrasting against dark blue night skies. High-quality game engine rendering creates a cinematic, atmospheric horror setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered garden walkway with wooden trellis

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered walkway alongside the mansion, flanked by wooden lattice walls

entered.detail: wooden arbor with lattice sides creating a tunnel-like covered path
large historic stone house with multiple windows and shutters
black metal fence running along the left side of the path
wooden lattice section attached to the mansion wall
red brick paving stones underfoot

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, covered garden walkway with wooden trellis walls on both sides. The Victorian mansion looms on the right with its windows and lattice panels visible, while an iron fence runs along the left. The pathway is paved with bricks, and the overhead arbor creates a sheltered, enclosed atmosphere with low lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion courtyard with grand entrance stairs

events.description: exits the covered trellis walkway into the open mansion courtyard
emerges from darkness into area illuminated by warm exterior wall lanterns

agents.ego_description: approaching the mansion's grand staircase and entrance, glancing at the illuminated doorway

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the mansion's main entrance with wooden railings
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm yellow light
painted wooden bench sitting near the stairs
planters flanking the staircase entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a courtyard illuminated by warm exterior lanterns. The mansion's grand staircase dominates the right side, flanked by potted plants and a white garden bench. The sky is now visible overhead as the camera approaches the entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden with pergola and central fountain

events.description: central tiered fountain comes into view as camera rounds the garden path

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden beds toward the wooden pergola and central fountain area

entered.detail: open wooden structure with cross-beams providing partial cover
multi-level stone fountain with water basin
raised garden beds with vegetation
small rectangular pool of water

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the garden, the camera passes under a wooden pergola and approaches a central tiered fountain. The mansion shifts to the left side of the frame as the path curves, revealing flower beds and a small reflecting pool. The atmosphere remains foggy with mixed lighting from the house windows and moonlight.

events.description: begins circling around the fountain to view the mansion facade

agents.ego_description: circling the central fountain to view the mansion's front facade and lit windows

entered.detail: decorative wooden lattice fence section

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the tiered fountain, bringing the mansion's front facade into full view with its illuminated windows and grand entrance. The fountain moves to the background as the perspective shifts, and the white bench reappears on the left side of the frame.

events.description: passes through a trellis archway into a narrower side passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the trellis archway along the side of the mansion

entered.detail: arched wooden trellis structure marking passage to side garden
white painted lattice fencing along the path
wall-mounted light fixture on the mansion side

segments.scene_description: Moving to the side of the property, the camera passes through a trellis archway into a narrower, more enclosed passage. The mansion wall dominates the right side with an exterior sconce providing light, while lattice fencing runs along the left. The fountain and main garden fade from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley between mansion and perimeter wall

events.description: path becomes darker with only distant lanterns illuminating the foggy alley

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow path between the mansion and a high stone wall, heading toward distant lights

entered.detail: tall stone or brick wall running along the left side of the path
large tree with spreading branches and autumn foliage
distant lamp posts casting yellow light through the fog

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrow alley between the mansion and a high perimeter wall. The ground transitions to a dirt path, and the scene is darker with only distant street lamps piercing through the fog. A large oak tree dominates the center distance as the camera moves toward the open garden area beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, sheltered walkway into the expansive, moonlit grounds of a Victorian estate. It begins within a narrow garden path enclosed by wooden trellis walls and an iron fence, with the mansion looming closely on the right. As the camera exits the covered arbor, the space opens into a wide courtyard illuminated by warm exterior lanterns, revealing a grand staircase and a white garden bench. The scene then shifts as the camera moves under a wooden pergola and curves around a central tiered fountain, causing the mansion to slide to the left of the frame. Finally, the path leads deeper into the foggy garden, passing flower beds and a reflecting pool under a blend of moonlight and glowing window light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the open, illuminated grandeur of a mansion's central garden into a secluded, fog-shrouded perimeter alley. It begins by circling a tiered fountain, shifting the perspective to reveal the mansion's glowing windows and grand entrance before a white bench slides into view on the left. As the camera moves toward the side of the property, it passes through a trellis archway into a narrower passage where the mansion wall and a flickering exterior sconce dominate the right side. The scene then shifts into a dark, enclosed alleyway between the house and a high perimeter wall, with the ground transitioning from manicured garden to a dirt path. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the thickening fog toward a large oak tree and the open garden area beyond, guided only by the dim glow of distant street lamps.
